title: asarum asperum var. asperum
intro: Asarum asperum var. asperum, also known as the rough-ginger or rough candyroot, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asarum genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Asarum asperum var. asperum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce nausea, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Asarum asperum var. asperum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine practices.
